title: ECHS Officer In Charge Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: Ex Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) Officer In Charge Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.echs.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ECHS Officer In Charge Recruitment 2026.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Officer In Charge Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ECHS Officer-In-Charge recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the ECHS Officer-In-Charge post is 29th June 2026. Candidates are strongly advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Officer-In-Charge post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Officer-In-Charge position is a Graduate degree. Candidates must ensure they possess this qualification to be eligible for the recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Officer-In-Charge position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Officer-In-Charge post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 95,000 per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Officer-In-Charge recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Officer-In-Charge post is 65 years. There is no minimum age specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Officer-In-Charge post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Officer-In-Charge post in Ferozepur Cantt, Punjab.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as per the instructions in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the ECHS Officer-In-Charge recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Officer-In-Charge post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Officer-In-Charge post will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Officer-In-Charge position is contractual. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of ECHS, which is www.echs.gov.in. It is recommended to check the website for the most up-to-date information.
